videos.headline: Hugh Freeze: No. 24 Auburn has room to improve with SEC play ahead
videos.description: Although Freeze remains tough on the Tigers despite the 31-15 win, he is sure to highlight Jeremiah Cobb's performance and their 3-0 record heading into conference play.

videos.headline: Jeremiah Cobb credits game plan, O-line for Auburn win
videos.description: After rushing for 119 yards and a touchdown, Cobb emphasizes how trusting the coaches' game plan and the O-line's push paved the way for the Tigers' success.
